description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout with large windows and sliding glass doors that connect the interior to the garden spaces. The front of the bungalow is defined by a paved driveway and a small lawn, leading up to a covered entrance area. The rear of the property includes a private garden area, bordered by trees for privacy, and a patio space for outdoor living. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by wooden or composite accents and extensive glazing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a paved driveway and open-plan layout.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the bungalow with dense greenery, a private garden, and the back facade with large windows and patio access.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, highlighting the boundary wall, side garden, and the open-plan interior layout visible through the roof.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the bungalow, featuring the driveway, main entrance, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees and lawn.
description_view_3: View 3 offers the opposite side view, showing the side garden, boundary wall, and the open-plan interior from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
